steps.title: Prepare 4 effendorfs label them, each...
steps.instruction: Prepare 4 effendorfs label them, each one will contain the master mix of a certain toehold primer. Attention: Keep the polymerase on ice avoiding denaturation. (Order of pipetting: H 2 O -> Q5 MasterMix -> primers) %s %s MM5 Volume25 Reference (25 uL)Per tubeMaster mix1Master mix2Master mix3Master mix4pJL1-sfGFP-2(~60ng/uL)11 sfGFP_fwd1.251.256.256.256.256.25Toehold_BN_1.1(10uM)1.251.256.25 Toehold_BN_1.2(10uM) 6.25 Toehold_BN_1.3(10uM) 6.25 Toehold_BN_1.4(10uM) 6.25dNTPs (10 mM)\\\\\\Q5 Reaction Buffer (5X)\\\\\\Q5 MasterMix12.512.562.562.562.562.5H2O9945454545Total2525120120120120

steps.title: Pipette up and down mix the master mix thoroughly
steps.instruction: Pipette up and down mix the master mix thoroughly.

steps.title: Take 20 PCR tubes label them,...
steps.instruction: Take 20 PCR tubes label them, pipette 24 μl of the master mix into the tubes accordingly.

steps.title: Add 1 μl of DNA template into each PCR tubes
steps.instruction: Add 1 μl of DNA template into each PCR tubes
